overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along a rain-soaked highway shoulder at night in a dystopian game setting. The camera moves steadily past a large illuminated 'CONBATONS' billboard and abandoned vehicles, with wind turbines visible in the misty background and moderate traffic passing on the wet asphalt.

events.description: yellow vehicle passes close by on the left, temporarily blocking the view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the highway shoulder in heavy rain, approaching the large illuminated billboard ahead

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past on the highway with red taillights visible
oncoming vehicle with headlights visible through the rain

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard with red and white CONBATONS branding standing beside the highway
multiple large industrial wind turbines with circular blade structures visible in the misty distance
wet multi-lane highway with puddles reflecting vehicle lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-swept highway at night, with the camera moving forward along the shoulder toward a prominent illuminated CONBATONS billboard. Wind turbines stand in the hazy background while vehicles periodically pass by on the wet asphalt to the left, and a yellow car briefly occludes the view as it passes close by.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder passing billboard and abandoned vehicle

events.description: large dark truck passes by on the left, splashing through roadside puddles
camera passes the abandoned red car with open doors on the right shoulder

agents.ego_description: continuing along the shoulder, passing the abandoned vehicle and moving alongside the billboard structure

notable_agents.action: green van passing by on the highway
abandoned red sedan with open doors and damaged body on the shoulder

entered.detail: derelict red sedan with doors ajar, partially overgrown with weeds

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the large CONBATONS billboard on the right, revealing an abandoned red car with open doors on the shoulder. Traffic continues to flow on the highway as the billboard recedes to the right and eventually passes out of view behind the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway stretch with distant industrial structures

events.description: black SUV with roof rack passes by on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the open highway shoulder, leaving the billboard behind and continuing toward the distant city glow

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving past with red taillights reflecting on wet road

entered.detail: faint orange glow of city lights visible on the horizon through the rain

segments.scene_description: Having passed the billboard and abandoned car, the camera continues along the desolate highway stretch. Wind turbines line the horizon while sporadic traffic passes by, and the roadside shows signs of abandonment with overgrown vegetation and scattered debris. A faint city glow appears in the distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a rain-soaked highway shoulder that transitions from a brightly lit commercial landmark toward a desolate, distant city glow. It begins by advancing through the mist toward a prominent illuminated CONBATONS billboard, with wind turbines looming in the hazy background and a passing yellow car briefly obscuring the view. As the camera passes the billboard, the scene opens up to reveal an abandoned red car with its doors flung open on the shoulder while traffic continues to flow on the wet asphalt. The perspective then shifts further down the desolate stretch, moving past overgrown vegetation and scattered debris as the billboard recedes from sight. Finally, the camera continues its steady trek along the roadside, with the horizon of wind turbines giving way to a faint, atmospheric city light appearing in the distance.
